html:
Exclusive to:

The Doydoy Feather is an Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is dropped when Doydoys are killed or when a Doydoy Nest is Hammered. There is also a 20% chance for a Doydoy Feather to drop when Doydoys mate. The feather can be used to craft the Tropical Fan, Feather Lite Sail, and Doydoy Nest.

The '''Doydoy Feather''' is an [[Items|Item]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is dropped when [[Doydoy]]s are killed or when a [[Doydoy Nest]] is [[Hammer]]ed. There is also a 20% chance for a Doydoy Feather to drop when Doydoys mate. The feather can be used to craft the [[Tropical Fan]], [[Feather Lite Sail]], and [[Doydoy Nest]].

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
